name: PEC: accredited program search
summary: Adds one private local search across Pakistan Engineering Council's long regional Level-I accreditation directory.

operations.title: Find an accredited engineering program
operations.description: Search institutions, cities, disciplines, and intake years across every regional Level-I list.
operations.placeholder: Try Karachi, software engineering, or an institution

changelog: Initial release: bounded private search, accessible result counts, slash-to-focus, and Escape-to-clear across the public PEC Level-I directory.
